data.title: RYVYL closed $6.0 million public offering, selling 15,384,615 shares at $0.39 each, with warrants.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, RYVYL Inc. (NASDAQ: RVYL), a key player in electronic payment technology, disclosed the completion of its recent public offering. The offering consisted of 15,384,615 shares of common stock (or prefunded warrants) and warrants allowing the purchase of an equivalent number of shares. Priced at $0.39 per share and warrant, the total public offering amounted to $0.39 per share. The warrants, which can be exercised instantly upon receipt, have an exercise price matching the share price and remain valid until the fifth anniversary of their issuance.

data.title: Stocks like Nvidia and Taiwan Semiconductor surged on strong earnings. GE Aerospace also rose. Keep an eye on Netflix.
data.description: Shares of Taiwan Semiconductor, a leading chipmaker for Nvidia, surged following robust earnings, contributing to the positive performance of the chip sector. Additionally, GE Aerospace saw a notable rally in its stock. The focus now shifts to Netflix, as investors anticipate its potential impact on the market. This news resulted in Dow Jones Futures experiencing a boost.

data.title: General Glen D. VanHerck joins C Speed's Board of Directors, bringing defense expertise to radar company.
data.description: An ex-NORAD and USNORTHCOM Commander is now providing strategic defense expertise to the cutting-edge radar company, C Speed, based in Syracuse, New York. As of July 17, 2025, C Speed, known for its advanced radar solutions powered by software, disclosed that General [Name] has joined the team. C Speed operates under NewSpring Holdings, a company platform, and continues to make strides in technological innovation in the radar industry.

data.title: Roblox introduces new safety features like Age Estimation, promoting secure connections for teens. #RobloxSafety
data.description: Researchers have discovered a potentially habitable exoplanet located approximately 110 light-years from Earth. This planet, named K2-18b, is twice the size of Earth and orbits within the habitable zone of its star, where conditions may be suitable for liquid water to exist. The planet's atmosphere contains hydrogen and helium, along with water vapor. The discovery was made using data from the Hubble Space Telescope and the Kepler Space Telescope. Scientists are excited about the possibility of finding signs of life on this distant world.

data.title: US FDA approves GSK's SHINGRIX in prefilled syringe. It simplifies administration process for healthcare with Zoster Vaccine.
data.description: In Philadelphia, GSK plc (LSE/NYSE: GSK) revealed the FDA's approval of a prefilled syringe version of SHINGRIX (Zoster Vaccine Recombinant, Adjuvanted) for shielding against shingles (herpes zoster). This new syringe eradicates the necessity to mix separate vials before use, streamlining the vaccination process for healthcare providers. The current vaccine format includes two vials.

data.title: China International Supply Chain Expo opened in Beijing on July 16th, 2025; organized by CCPIT; global participants present.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the third China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE) inaugurated in Beijing on July 16. The event, organized by the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade (CCPIT), saw participation from global representatives.

data.title: Pentair names Lance Bonner as Executive VP, General Counsel and Secretary. Bonner joins on August 11, 2025. CEO John Stauch welcomes him back.
data.description: In London, Pentair plc (NYSE: PNR) has appointed Lance Bonner as the new Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary. Bonner will assume the role starting August 11, 2025, and will report directly to John Stauch, President and CEO of Pentair. Stauch expressed his satisfaction in having Bonner rejoin Pentair, highlighting his confidence in Bonner's leadership qualities. Pentair is renowned for its commitment to water sustainability and enhancing global water experiences.

data.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) to review Q2 2025 results in conference call on Aug 7 at 8am CDT. Dial 877-344-2001, Conference ID 2528845. Replay available.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp., a publicly traded company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol USFD, will be holding a live conference call and webcast to discuss its second quarter results for 2025. The event is scheduled for Thursday, August 7, 2025, starting at 8 a.m. CDT. Individuals interested in participating can join the conference call by dialing 877-344-2001. data.title: JPMorgan may impose fees on data aggregators for crypto transactions, potentially crippling the industry, warn experts.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) is contemplating implementing fees on transactions involving cryptocurrencies and third-party services, a move that could have a substantial impact on the fintech sector, according to experts. The plan revolves around charging data aggregators like Plaid and MX each time a customer initiates a fund transfer from their JPMorgan Chase account to a cryptocurrency account or a third-party service like Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD). These aggregators are commonly utilized by crypto firms and fintech companies to access customer accounts within major financial institutions such as JPMorgan Chase. Concerns have been raised by industry insiders that the introduction of these fees could render it economically impractical for many consumers to utilize stablecoins and cryptocurrencies. There are fears that the proposed fees might severely harm the crypto industry, with some anonymous industry executives suggesting that the move could potentially force businesses to increase their prices by up to 1000%. Find the latest price of JPM stock here. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that a significant increase in COVID-19 cases has been recorded in the region. The total number of new cases has surged to a record high of 2,500 in the past week alone. This spike in infections has raised concerns among health officials and the public alike. Additionally, the total death toll due to the virus has now reached 500, highlighting the severity of the situation. Authorities are urging the population to adhere to safety guidelines and protocols to curb the spread of the virus. The rising numbers serve as a stark reminder of the ongoing threat posed by the pandemic and the importance of taking necessary precautions to protect against it.
